news.text:
Nansen API usage = up only.

my fav way to use it is to give it to OpenClaw 🦞

> npm i -g nansen-cli

BOOM! your claw now h
news.summary: Nansen API使用量持续上升，推荐将其与OpenClaw结合使用，可通过npm安装nansen-cli让OpenClaw具备链上观察能力

news.text:
